items.name: Bloody Yukata
items.description: A white kimono with dark crimson stains on the sleeve. The fabric is torn near the hem.

items.name: Rusted Katana
items.description: An old samurai sword covered in rust. The handle wrapping has come loose.

items.name: Spilled Matcha
items.description: A broken tea bowl with green powder scattered across the tatami.

items.name: Torn Paper Fan
items.description: A decorative fan with cherry blossom patterns. Several ribs are broken.

items.name: Kitsune Mask
items.description: A fox mask with cracks running through the left eye. Dried flowers are tucked into the straps.

items.name: Burnt Scroll
items.description: An ancient scroll with singed edges. The calligraphy is barely legible.

items.name: Gold Koban
items.description: A rare Edo-period gold coin. Someone has scratched a symbol into the surface.

items.name: Jade Hairpin
items.description: An ornate hairpin with a jade flower. One petal is chipped.

items.name: Temple Bell
items.description: A small bronze bell from a shrine. The clapper is missing.

items.name: Ceremonial Dagger
items.description: A ritual knife with an ivory handle. Dark residue stains the blade.
